scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.start:local: NODE_ENV=production HARBOR_HOSTED=1 HARBOR_BITCOIN=mock HARBOR_SERVE_WEB=1 node server/dist/index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:integration -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
